name: Pirates of the Caribbean
description: The Disney swashbuckler film series starring Johnny Depp as Captain Jack Sparrow

questions.q: Which actor plays Captain Jack Sparrow?

source.notes: Depp modeled Sparrow's mannerisms partly on Keith Richards.

questions.q: What is the name of Captain Jack Sparrow's beloved ship?

source.notes: Originally named Wicked Wench.

questions.q: Which 2003 film launched the Pirates of the Caribbean franchise?
choices: The Curse of the Black Pearl

source.original_a: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
source.notes: Directed by Gore Verbinski.

questions.q: Who plays Elizabeth Swann throughout the original trilogy?

source.notes: Also cameoed in Dead Men Tell No Tales (2017).

questions.q: Who plays the blacksmith-turned-pirate Will Turner?

source.notes: Filmed the role between Lord of the Rings sequels.

questions.q: Which Disney theme park ride inspired the film series?

source.original_a: Pirates of the Caribbean at Disneyland
source.notes: The ride opened in 1967; the final one overseen by Walt Disney.

questions.q: What cursed treasure sets the plot of The Curse of the Black Pearl in motion?

source.notes: The 882 pieces of cursed Aztec gold in a chest.

questions.q: Who directed the first three Pirates of the Caribbean films?

source.notes: Also directed The Ring and Rango.

questions.q: Who plays Captain Hector Barbossa?

source.notes: Won an Oscar for Shine (1996); appears in four Pirates films.

questions.q: Who plays the barnacled villain Davy Jones, captain of the Flying Dutchman?

source.notes: Fully CGI character built around Nighy's motion-captured performance.

questions.q: What giant sea monster attacks the Black Pearl in Dead Man's Chest?

source.notes: Controlled by Davy Jones.

questions.q: Which prolific Disney producer shepherds the Pirates of the Caribbean series?

source.notes: Also produced Top Gun, Armageddon, and Bad Boys.

questions.q: The sea witch Tia Dalma is revealed in At World's End to be which mythological goddess?

source.notes: Played by Naomie Harris.

questions.q: What mythical source does Jack Sparrow seek in On Stranger Tides (2011)?

source.notes: The fourth film, directed by Rob Marshall.

questions.q: Which legendary pirate is the antagonist in On Stranger Tides?

source.notes: Played by Ian McShane; historical figure Edward Teach.

questions.q: Which Spanish actress plays Blackbeard's daughter Angelica in On Stranger Tides?

source.notes: Cruz's twin sister Mónica stood in during some scenes due to Cruz's pregnancy.

questions.q: Who plays Captain Salazar, the ghostly main antagonist of Dead Men Tell No Tales (2017)?

source.notes: Cursed crew hunting pirates on the Silent Mary.

questions.q: Which Rolling Stones guitarist cameos as Captain Teague, Jack's father, in At World's End?

source.notes: Depp had cited Richards as a key inspiration for Jack Sparrow's mannerisms.

questions.q: What is the name of Commodore James Norrington's flagship in The Curse of the Black Pearl?

source.notes: The Interceptor is the smaller, faster brig captured early on.

questions.q: Who plays Will Turner's barnacle-encrusted father, 'Bootstrap' Bill Turner?

source.notes: Known for Mamma Mia!, Dune, and Thor.

questions.q: Which British stage actor plays the well-meaning Governor Weatherby Swann?

source.notes: Also played The Two Popes's Pope Francis (2019).

questions.q: Which actor plays Lord Cutler Beckett, the East India Trading Company's cold antagonist?

source.notes: Also known for The Night Manager and Bohemian Rhapsody.
